programme.title: E28 - The Round Up Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and pal Rodeo Horse.

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: E43 - Go Jet Academy: Dream Team Trouble
programme.desc: After Glitch accidentally destroys part of the Academy, he and Ubercorn have a huge argument. When he heads to Grim HQ to make amends, Ubercorn is accidentally trapped.

programme.title: E2 - Evil Pea's Big Freeze
programme.desc: Evil Pea freezes the veggies so she can take over the whole supermarket. Chilli's heat unfreezes Supertato who then races on lolly-stick skis to thwart Evil Pea and save the day.

programme.title: E62 - Trailer
programme.desc: When it's time for the Tubby Custard Ride, there's a special trailer the Teletubbies haven't seen before. It's for The Noo-Noo who gets to go on a special Tubby Custard Ride.

programme.title: E33 - Turbo Ted
programme.desc: Ted the bus wants to be faster, and Mojo swops every top to try to make it happen. But it's Bo's homemade rocket that gives Ted the boost he needs... all the way into space!

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E32 - Tradies
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E7 - The Sibling Badge
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E27 - Pirates
programme.desc: It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: E30 - Barky Boats
programme.desc: Bluey and Mackenzie are excited to spend time with their two buddies Mia and Captain; when the older kids run off to play together without them, Calypso explains that growing up can be hard.

programme.title: E46 - Slide
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: E2 - The Duck Badge
programme.desc: The clubhouse is inundated with stray ducklings who think Norrie is their mum.

programme.title: E1 - The Tooth Brushing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath.

programme.title: E52 - The Glasses Badge
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true?

programme.title: E3 - Heart Of Gold
programme.desc: Toby's passengers can't stop making fun of him, that is until he discovers two villains trying to steal King Godred's crown.

programme.title: E14 - Dig
programme.desc: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together.

programme.title: E13 - Farm
programme.desc: Amare asks Stanley to help her on the farm. Stanley asks Little Woo, Fred and Fifi to join him in sowing seeds, watering plants and picking apples, all whilst having fun.

programme.title: E34 - It's Time To Ice Skate
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran go ice-skating. While Gran Gran is a little nervous, JoJo is a natural. With Jared's help Gran Gran soon gets the hang of it!

programme.title: E28 - Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E29 - Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: How X-Ray Imaging Is Driving A Crash Test Revolution
programme.desc: High-speed X-rays let researchers see exactly what happens during a collision. Also on the show: plastic-eating worms, a sailboat for ocean research, and why women in soccer run farther and play harder than men.

programme.title: When Bears Roamed The Streets Of A Romanian Resort
programme.desc: A tourist hotspot turned into a danger zone as bears came daily. Now the town is a success story. Plus: How a German village got dirt cheap energy prices. And Ethiopia's stilt walkers balance tradition and modernity.

programme.title: Why Gaudi's Sagrada Familia Will Blow Your Mind
programme.desc: Antoni Gaudi's Sagrada Familia in Barcelona is a living masterpiece - and probably the world's most famous construction site. 2026 marks 100 years since the death of the visionary who redefined architecture.

programme.title: Afrobeats Inspire Ugandans To Dance To A Different Tune

programme.title: E127 - Xingo/Speechless On The Seine/King Of The Castle/Moor Fogg/Hole in 10
programme.desc: Ben is interested in a marathon of his favourite cartoon show, 'Spazz', but when Ben goes Upgrade to get a better signal, 'Spazz' leaps from his animated dimension, bringing chaos with him!

programme.title: E4 - A. The Demon in the Mattress/House of Discontent/Courage under the Volcano/Muriel Mee
programme.desc: Muriel needs a new mattress. The one she orders comes with a bonus: a demon, which takes over her body. Courage must find a way to get rid of the demon and the new mattress.

programme.title: E1 - The Power/Do Me A Solid/Cool Bikes/Firework Run/The Heart Of A Stuntman
programme.desc: Rigby steals a magic keyboard from a preoccupied sorcerer. When Mordecai and Rigby accidentally make a hole in the wall while wrestling a stuffed animal, they use the keyboard to make Pops and Benson give them raises to try to pay for it.

programme.title: E266 - Buktu The Future/High Stress Express/Half-Sies/Xingo's Back/Gentle Ben
programme.desc: After Tim Buktu's live stream is mysteriously cut short, Team Tennyson must attempt a rescue mission and break inside the highly confidential Area 55 in order to save him.

programme.title: E1402 - Christmas Magic/Azarath, Metrion Bookstore/The Great Azarathian Face Off/Bookyman/Unl
programme.desc: After the Titans get shrunken by Mumbo’s magic, they must scale a Christmas Tree to prevent Mumbo from ruining their Christmas.

programme.title: E425 - Dc Comic Book Club/Them Jaws
programme.desc: Robin hosts a DC Comics book club but the other Titans may not have done the assigned reading.

programme.title: E15 - Good Mitch Spiking/Stilt Walkers
programme.desc: Muscle Man reveals his secret past.

programme.title: E139 - The Synthesis/The Score
programme.desc: During School's Career Day, Nicole and Yuki Yoshida unite to impress their children and show the world their full power, only to learn where real power comes from...

programme.title: E113 - Foam Party/Bianca's Crazy Day
programme.desc: Jim finds out that the sardines have parties, and it looks like he is somehow not on the list. He tries to not take it personally, but it's hard to be both a captain and a friend…

programme.title: E418 - The Tribe/Dragon Bros/The Little Ghost Prince
programme.desc: During a chase, Lamput stumbles onto an underground primeval tribe. He gets mistakenly revered as the Chosen One. How are the Docs going to catch him now?

programme.title: E15 - Good Mitch Spiking/Stilt Walkers
programme.desc: Muscle Man reveals his secret past.

programme.title: E23 - Chloe and Ice Bear/Hibernation
programme.desc: On a day out with just Chloe and Ice Bear, she realises that Ice Bear only runs errands for his brothers. Determined to show him a fun day in the city, Chloe promises to help Ice Bear have a good time, even if it means staying in a museum after it closes.

programme.title: E248 - Forest Pirates/Snot And Tears/Tv Knight 5/Campfire!/The Metric System Vs. Freedom
programme.desc: The Titans are at Super Hero Summer Camp for the week and they may need to add another teammate to win the big canoe race.

programme.title: E139 - Shmorby/Bros in the City/Band of Outsiders/Baby Orphan Ninja Bears/Panda's Birthday
programme.desc: The Bears get a Shmorby home assistant device and become lazy couch potatoes.

programme.title: E271 - Ketchup/Fionna And Cake And Fionna/Whispers/Three Buckets/Orb
programme.desc: BMO and Marceline swap stories about their recent adventures.

programme.title: E15 - Good Mitch Spiking/Stilt Walkers

programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: E2 - Avesnois
programme.desc: Actor Roda Fawaz is cycling through the Avesnois regional nature park, nicknamed the secret garden of the Ch'tis. A green immersion just a stone's throw from the Belgian border.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: It's the start of a new day at the animal sanctuary... For Marilys, the night was short after the unexpected arrival of three kittens. Cecilia is particularly worried about Kenzo, and Signourey, who's manning the reception desk, is saddened to see the return of a former resident, Thor...

programme.title: 6H Info:2025-2026
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin:2025-2026
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin:2025-2026
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Slam:2026
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada:2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: E10 - Petit Papa's Adventures
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: E35 - The Maize Stalk Borer
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: E18 - No Glasses? No Problem!
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Temps Present:2025-2026
programme.desc: ''Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2:2025-2026
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Naestro, De La Rue A L'opera
programme.desc: Nabil Rachdi, known as Naestro, grew up near Marseille. Passionate about boxing, karate and MMA, his life took a different turn when he was arrested for drug trafficking. In prison, he had a revelation: he discovered his tenor voice and began listening to opera. He would become a singer.

programme.title: E2 - Sylvain Huchette, Mael Kervennal
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Naestro, De La Rue A L'opera
programme.desc: Nabil Rachdi, known as Naestro, grew up near Marseille. Passionate about boxing, karate and MMA, his life took a different turn when he was arrested for drug trafficking. In prison, he had a revelation: he discovered his tenor voice and began listening to opera. He would become a singer.

programme.title: E5 - Rusty Crayfish
programme.desc: In the land of ten thousand lakes, Leech Lake stands out, because it's the third largest lake located entirely within the state of Minnesota. Known as a destination for walleye, pike and muskie fishing, Leech Lake attracts fishermen from all over the Midwest... and that's where the trouble began. Fishermen from the Ohio River Basin brought rusty crawfish up to Leech Lake as bait... and when done fishing, they released them, inadvertently giving the rusty crayfish a new home. Now, the rustys are pushing out the native crayfish, and destroying the weed beds the muskie, pike and walleye depend on. Fishing guide Phil Bauerly sees the destruction daily. To combat the rustys, Phil regularly throws lakeside crayfish boils for family and friends... and Yia just received his invitation to join.

programme.title: E6 - Common Carp
programme.desc: Common carp are one of the most widely introduced species of fish in the world. However, most people in the U.S. won't eat them, referring to them as a 'trash fish.' Bowfisherman and fishing guide Curt Cich will tell you otherwise, as these fish are fun to bowhunt, have plenty of fresh meat and are delicious smoked. These fish are so plentiful, Curt runs a year-round full-time guiding service targeting only carp.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E1 - Anthony Joshua
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls teaches the unified world heavyweight champion some alternative survival skills.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E8 - Victoria: Culinary Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: E9 - Sara’s Favourites
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: E12 - World Remix
programme.desc: In this special episode, we take you around the world for a look at never-before-seen shenanigans of the BMX duo, and you won’t believe some of the activities that didn’t make the previous episodes. Rooftop and Catfish hatch crocodiles, get maced in a gas chamber, attempt to grow Catfish a few inches, race tuk tuk carts in Thailand, and so much more. They try out a Romanian banya sauna, ride a human run wooden Ferris wheel, try the explosive Columbian game tejo, and last but not least neuter a horse. Enjoy this action packed special of even crazier activities.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E12 - World Remix
programme.desc: In this special episode, we take you around the world for a look at never-before-seen shenanigans of the BMX duo, and you won’t believe some of the activities that didn’t make the previous episodes. Rooftop and Catfish hatch crocodiles, get maced in a gas chamber, attempt to grow Catfish a few inches, race tuk tuk carts in Thailand, and so much more. They try out a Romanian banya sauna, ride a human run wooden Ferris wheel, try the explosive Columbian game tejo, and last but not least neuter a horse. Enjoy this action packed special of even crazier activities.

programme.title: E8 - Victoria: Culinary Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: E9 - Sara’s Favourites
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: E5 - Rusty Crayfish
programme.desc: In the land of ten thousand lakes, Leech Lake stands out, because it's the third largest lake located entirely within the state of Minnesota. Known as a destination for walleye, pike and muskie fishing, Leech Lake attracts fishermen from all over the Midwest... and that's where the trouble began. Fishermen from the Ohio River Basin brought rusty crawfish up to Leech Lake as bait... and when done fishing, they released them, inadvertently giving the rusty crayfish a new home. Now, the rustys are pushing out the native crayfish, and destroying the weed beds the muskie, pike and walleye depend on. Fishing guide Phil Bauerly sees the destruction daily. To combat the rustys, Phil regularly throws lakeside crayfish boils for family and friends... and Yia just received his invitation to join.

programme.title: E6 - Common Carp
programme.desc: Common carp are one of the most widely introduced species of fish in the world. However, most people in the U.S. won't eat them, referring to them as a 'trash fish.' Bowfisherman and fishing guide Curt Cich will tell you otherwise, as these fish are fun to bowhunt, have plenty of fresh meat and are delicious smoked. These fish are so plentiful, Curt runs a year-round full-time guiding service targeting only carp.

E107 - Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: E108 - Double Booked
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once.

programme.title: E827 - Valentine's Day
programme.desc: It is Valentine's Day and Daddy Pig gives Mummy Pig a card but Where's Daddy Pig's card from Mummy? Mummy Pig had put it in the post, but it hasn't arrived yet. Will Daddy Pig get a card?

programme.title: E828 - The Perfect Day
programme.desc: Peppa and her family visit a big shop full of little shops! Mummy is visiting the spa for a 'Perfect Day Experience', so Peppa, George and Daddy Pig explore the shopping centre in search of their own perfect days!

programme.title: E825 - Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Molly Mole and Freddy Fox dig a huge tunnel and find a box of pirate treasure. The treasure has gone missing - something mysterious is going on!

programme.title: E218 - Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E118 - Barbapileup
programme.desc: Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: E603 - Pups Save A Melon Festival
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's plan to win the giant melon contest goes off the rails when his 'melon' bounces away, causing chaos all over town!

programme.title: E224 - The Crew And Rocky Build A Bear Island
programme.desc: Rocky visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay just in time to see Builder Cove's new baby bear! But when Park Ranger Rose asks for construction help, Speed Meister accidentally ruins the bears' home. It's up to all the pups and Rocky to save the day!

programme.title: E218 - Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E309 - The Crew Builds An Art Museum / The Crew Builds A Giant Alphorn
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: E310 - The Crew Builds A Skyscraper
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are building their biggest construction project ever... a skyscraper! And a job that huge calls for brand-new, mega-sized construction vehicles! But when Speed Meister sees the pups' big trucks, he calls in help from his big brother.

programme.title: E120 - Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: E209 - Times Machine / Super Tim / Uncle Tiberius
programme.desc: Tim and Tia build a time machine to avoid telling Dad the truth. // Tim goes to DinoStar's training academy, but is confused by his hero's training methods. // Uncle Tiberius comes to visit the Rexes, and Tim must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: E101 - The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: E101 - The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' Birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: E510 - Deep Sea Grand Prix
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Blaze and AJ are racing under the ocean! Blaze transforms into a submarine and speeds through sunken ships and coral reefs to reach the giant sand castle at the finish line!

programme.title: E125 - The Crew Builds A Parking Garage / The Crew Builds A Campsite
programme.desc: The Crew helps with a parking problem when Cafe Carl's ice cream machine brings lots of cars to Builder Cove. // When Rubble's fear of the dark derails the pup's Bark Yard campout, the Crew comes up with an idea to help him enjoy the starry night.

programme.title: E119 - Pups Save A Super Pup / Pups Save Ryder's Robot
programme.desc: Rubble is pretending to be a super pup but get's himself in some trouble. Ryder and the Paw Patrol have to save Rubble! // When Ryder's Robot Pup breaks and starts going wild around Adventure Bay, it takes the whole Paw Patrol to help Ryder find it.

programme.title: E319 - Monster Mix-Up / Space Station Staycation
programme.desc: The Deer finds a video of a marine 'monster' from Kai's drone and go underwater to investigate. But things aren't always what they seem. // Lady Fluffpot and Sir Steel spend a day in space onboard Deer Squad's Space Station.

programme.title: E210 - Friends
programme.desc: Tim & Kai have a rare disagreement, and each try to find a new best friend.

programme.title: E736 - Tiny Land
programme.desc: It's time for a day out and Peppa, George, Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig and Suzy Sheep all go to visit Tiny Land.

programme.title: E739 - Police Station
programme.desc: Oh, no! George has lost Mr. Dinosaur! Maybe the police can help George find him.

programme.title: E720 - Valentine's Day Rescue
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day! But when Zeg, Darington and Starla get lost on their way to the Valentine's Day party, it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue them.

programme.title: E201 - The Crew Builds A Roller Coaster/The Crew Builds Motor A Play Space
programme.desc: When Speed Meister's rollercoaster sends a pet playdate out of control, Rubble & Crew save the day with a bigger, better, and safer coaster. // The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?

programme.title: E823 - Pups Save The Floating Goodways / Pups Save The Portable Pet Wash
programme.desc: The Goodways drift out to sea on a swan shaped float and need rescued from a flock of real swans aiming to protect the giant inflatable. // Mayor Humdinger steals Katie's Portable Pet Wash and ends up causing bubble trouble all over town.

programme.title: E217 - Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: E218 - Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E210 - Friends
programme.desc: Tim & Kai have a rare disagreement, and each try to find a new best friend.

programme.title: E107 - Roar
programme.desc: It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town.

programme.title: E104 - The Hunt For The Hidden Hive / The Trouble Of The Toppled Trees
programme.desc: Special agent Indie helps the pals reunite a lost bee with the rest of her hive. // Sam and Kit try to uncover who has been chewing down the forest trees.

programme.title: E310 - Going Off With A Bang / Talent For Trouble
programme.desc: Steel and the Deer Squad want to organise a surprise party for Professor Scratch's birthday but the twins almost ruin the party. // To win the big talent show, Stu and Safia get Professor Scratch to programme Dinobot to obey their every command.

programme.title: E843 - Mr Bull The Teacher
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle must go to the dentist so leaves the class with Mr Bull. The children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching, so he decides to show them how to fix a squeaky floorboard.

programme.title: E316 - Fast Friends
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Gabby meet a brand new monster machine named Watts - a super fast truck with electric tires! But when one of her special tires goes rolling into the jungle, Blaze, AJ, and Gabby promise to help her get it back.

programme.title: E211 - The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Ra
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: E1 - Cursed Words And The Azure Tower
programme.desc: Oscar, crown prince of Farsas, visits the Witch of the Azure Moon at her tower to make a wish to lift his curse.

programme.title: E2 - The Past Recalled Once Again
programme.desc: When Tinasha stays with Oscar as his protector, she goes to investigate a magical lake where a demon beast is sealed.

programme.title: E2 - Returning With Glory II
programme.desc: Fearing a large-scale attack by Netherworld of the Deva, the Japanese government is willing to negotiate with MAR.

programme.title: E3 - Returning With Glory III
programme.desc: The villagers come to a new place where they can reunite with Avrora. Mogwai asks them to protect a sealing system.

programme.title: E11 - Sorcery And Magic
programme.desc: A demon, Ainswelf, appears and kills many soldiers. He calls Shion a descendant of Legreh and calls his magic 'sorcery'.

programme.title: E12 - Who Am I Really?
programme.desc: Shion realises he has gained an enormous amount of magic power, so he rushes to Marie's side to treat her disease.

programme.title: E11 - Miranda Lotto's Feelings
programme.desc: Allen is horrified that Road is a human working with the Akuma. Road attempts to kill Miranda, but fails as Allen rescues Miranda.

programme.title: E12 - And Snow Falls Over The Town
programme.desc: Road orders an Akuma to self-destruct, and Allen fails to exorcise it before it explodes. Allen is unable to kill Road, and she leaves the dimension.

programme.desc: Road orders an Akuma to self-destruct, and Allen fails to exorcise it before it explodes. Allen is unable to kill Road, and she leaves the dimension.

programme.title: E13 - With The Coat
programme.desc: Allen is unsure why he chose to become an exorcist, but is enlightened when he meets Lavi and wears the exorcist uniform.

programme.title: E11 - Sorcery And Magic
programme.desc: A demon, Ainswelf, appears and kills many soldiers. He calls Shion a descendant of Legreh and calls his magic 'sorcery'.

programme.title: E12 - Who Am I Really?
programme.desc: Shion realises he has gained an enormous amount of magic power, so he rushes to Marie's side to treat her disease.

programme.title: E818

programme.title: GT World Challenge Asia 2026 -Mandalika International Circuit, Indonesia Race 2
HSBC SVNS World Championships 2026 -Germany vs Argentina - 9th Playoffs, Bordeaux - Men
E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E7 - Twinkle's Bedtime Lullaby
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E1 - Gecko's Genius Outdoor Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko is using his genius for some amazing outdoor fixes! On a rainy camping trip, Green Mechanical runs out of battery, so Gecko & Grandma create a water wheel from scratch to recharge her with green energy! Then, when Mr. Weasel's advertising blimp starts to fly away with him attached, Gecko must use a bouncy castle to prepare a soft landing! From finding lost keys in a sandcastle to stopping Max from getting stuck in the mud, Gecko can fix it all!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: Get ready for epic rescues & Mr. Weasel's hilarious fails! The chaos begins when Weasel fills Max the Monster Truck's tires with helium, causing him to float away & forcing Gecko to perform a sky-high rescue! Then, Weasel's plan to give Molly extra bouncy springs goes wrong, & Gecko has to help her stop bouncing. The rescues continue when Weasel's new electro-magnet sucks up Baby Truck & the Mechanicals, & Gecko has to save the day!

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Big Pretend Play Dance Party!
programme.desc: Use your imagination at JJ's big pretend play dance party! Join Cody, Nina & Bella as they pretend to explore all sorts of fun places, from outer space to the bottom of the ocean. The fun continues as everyone learns how to do the robot dance to a beep-boop beat! Then, get into your pajamas for a slumber party where you can jump, wiggle & shuffle. With fun exercise moves & graceful ballet steps, it's a dance party where you can be anything you want!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: Get ready for epic rescues & Mr. Weasel's hilarious fails! The chaos begins when Weasel fills Max the Monster Truck's tires with helium, causing him to float away & forcing Gecko to perform a sky-high rescue! Then, Weasel's plan to give Molly extra bouncy springs goes wrong, & Gecko has to help her stop bouncing. The rescues continue when Weasel's new electro-magnet sucks up Baby Truck & the Mechanicals, & Gecko has to save the day!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E1 - Gecko's Genius Outdoor Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko is using his genius for some amazing outdoor fixes! On a rainy camping trip, Green Mechanical runs out of battery, so Gecko & Grandma create a water wheel from scratch to recharge her with green energy! Then, when Mr. Weasel's advertising blimp starts to fly away with him attached, Gecko must use a bouncy castle to prepare a soft landing! From finding lost keys in a sandcastle to stopping Max from getting stuck in the mud, Gecko can fix it all!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: Must Love Dogs
programme.desc: A lady sets out to change her single status by putting up a personal ad but realises she has too much to handle when men respond to the ad.

programme.title: E7 - The Titan Games Trials 7
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: E22 - Lie, Cheetah, Steal
programme.desc: When Assistant Coach Ferret goes down with an injury, his replacement, Mr. Cheetah, starts to take over Coach Gills's class.

programme.desc: When the CDMS Polar Wing starts to melt during a heat spell, Adam attributes it to global warming.

programme.desc: At the grocery store, Rodney feeds Andy some food samples that Andy is allergic to, causing him to bloat up like a giant ball.

programme.desc: Mr. J and Andy exclude Rodney from their club, so he hangs out with Mrs. J's ladies group.

programme.desc: When the Twins take the Marsupilamis to school, Stan spots Twister and claims a poisonous frog is loose to gain access.

programme.title: E106 - The Heat is on
programme.desc: It's the Chahuta's Chili eating contest, and soon it's revealed Marcel's a cheat.

programme.title: E214 - Beastie Pie
programme.desc: Marky's favorite social media influencer Beastie Pie, is hosting a gross food-eating competition at BoomBox Burger. When Sadie and Lay Lay overhear Beastie plans to rig the contest, they must work together to convince Marky that Beastie is a fraud.

programme.title: E111 - Tide and Prejudice
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: E305 - Mouth Candy
programme.desc: Jasper’s enthusiasm in crime fighting leads him to send Captain Man and Kid Danger into incidents that are not crimes. So when he is falsely accused of a burglary and sent to jail, Henry and Ray must find a way to set him free.

programme.title: E204 - iSaw Him First
programme.desc: When Carly and Sam show interest in the same boy, they vow to not let him come between them. This turns out to be more difficult than they imagined and soon their friendship is tested as they compete for his attention.

programme.title: E104 - Donnie Hangs Tough
programme.desc: It's a battle of the wits between Donnie and Bishop as he races through NYC's subway system to stop her evil Mechazoids. But how do you beat an AI that counters your every move?

programme.title: E212 - The Incredible Shrinking Sponge / Sportz?
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself. // Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: E309 - New Year on Ice
programme.desc: On New Year's Day, the group goes to a live performance of 'Reptar in Space on Ice: The Musical Experience.' Chuckie and Kimi worry that becoming one family means they can only do things one way, but they have different plans for how to help Reptar.

programme.title: E111 - Musical Mayhem / Purrfect Punch
programme.desc: The Marsupilamis are great at making music, and when a music producer hears it Jade says it was her. // Lalou's cat adoption day doesn't go smoothly, when Punch is adopted by mistake.

programme.title: E407 - Zoo U / A Remembrance of Grand-Past
programme.desc: The Star family goes on a college tour for Patrick... at the zoo. // GrandPat shares his life stories to spoil every movie at the theater.

programme.title: E708 - Road Trip: Screen Queen / Road Trip: Hide and Sneak
programme.desc: When the Louds' road trip takes them to Hollywood, Lola is determined to become a star and land a leading role. // To help Mom make the deadline for her column, the Louds have to avoid the Casagrandes when they visit Great Lakes City.

programme.title: E711 - Leave No Van Behind / Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: E714 - What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: When Dante buries a secret in The Royal Woods Cemetery, he must stop the Morticians Club from discovering what it is.

programme.title: E193 - Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. // To defend Bikini Bottom’s honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: E109 - Party Party / Mica's Robot
programme.desc: Thinking she hasn't been invited to Bibi's party Jade sneaks in. // Mica doesn't finish his robot in time for the school science fair, so the Marsupilamis squeeze inside and operate it.

programme.title: E115 - The Uncredible Journey / Host-a-Palooza
programme.desc: Tinkle, Ouchie, and Pinkeye must venture back home together after being taken away by mistake. // Patrick gets injured, so his family members take turns hosting the show.

programme.title: E304 - Selfie Improvement / No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. // Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: E305 - City Slickers / Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed. // The family has a new plan to dodge Luan's April Fool's Day pranking: stunt doubles

programme.title: E211 - Halmoni Learns the Internet / The Library
programme.desc: Halmoni feels she looks helpless about technology, so she becomes a master hacker and vows to destroy their internet FOREVER! // Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.title: E106 - The Three Ravens
programme.desc: Ellie & the kids investigate cryptic Mrs. Withers. When Jack goes missing in her creepy home, Ellie and Lil must save him!

programme.title: E102 - Heavy Meddle / Making the Case
programme.desc: Lincoln is tired of his sisters meddling in his business until he's being picked on at school. // Lincoln secretly videos his sister's most embarrassing moments in order to win a video contest at school.

programme.title: E213 - The Mastermind Unmasked: Part 2
programme.desc: When B.C. forces Chloe to steal a magical amulet that grants him superhero powers, the Thundermans unite to stop his plan. Chloe must reveal her identity to save her friends.

programme.title: E215 - iRocked the Vote
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie urge the iCarly fans to vote David Archuleta to victory on America Sings, they feel bad for the runner-up and help him make a music video. Meanwhile, Sam teaches Spencer how to lie like a pro.

programme.title: E809 - Bulking and Sulking / Wild Goss Chase
programme.desc: Dad struggles to run Lynn's Table when his brother Lance opens up a gym above the restaurant. // Privy to all the gossip at school, Lola is recruited to write her own gossip column in the school newspaper.

programme.title: E407 - Present Tense / Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. // Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters

programme.title: E262 - A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods for a weekend of silly pranks. // Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising.

programme.title: E704 - Tough Guise
programme.desc: When Zach is given detention, Rusty and the rest of their friends try to toughen up him up so he'll fit in.

programme.title: E102 - Heavy Meddle / Making the Case
programme.desc: Lincoln is tired of his sisters meddling in his business until he's being picked on at school. // Lincoln secretly videos his sister's most embarrassing moments in order to win a video contest at school.

programme.title: E202 - Wrong Text / Emergency Family Tribunal
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. // When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.title: E106 - Dig disaster
programme.desc: When Hope takes Gran Gran's special ladle to the park to play it ends up at Professor Lopez's archaeological dig.

programme.title: E910 - Gags To Riches / Sole Searching
programme.desc: After Luan pranks Grouse with a fake lottery ticket, she has to deal with the consequences of his massive shopping spree. // Lynn desperately searches for a popular brand of basketball shoes after she narrowly misses out on buying a pair.

programme.title: E111 - Musical Mayhem / Purrfect Punch
programme.desc: The Marsupilamis are great at making music, and when a music producer hears it Jade says it was her. // Lalou's cat adoption day doesn't go smoothly, when Punch is adopted by mistake.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E1 - Waterhole
programme.desc: Witness clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. See a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound, and a honey badger’s risky dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: E2 - Magicians of the Reef
programme.desc: Arabia’s coral reefs are home to some of nature’s most impressive illusionists. Creatures can pulsate with colour, transform in the blink of an eye, or perform riveting displays of showmanship. Because in these dangerous waters, disguise is crucial.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: E2 - Magicians of the Reef
programme.desc: Arabia’s coral reefs are home to some of nature’s most impressive illusionists. Creatures can pulsate with colour, transform in the blink of an eye, or perform riveting displays of showmanship. Because in these dangerous waters, disguise is crucial.

programme.title: E1 - A Penguin Proposal
programme.desc: Watch an Antarctic gentoo penguin pop the question with a rocky token of his devotion, then learn how a Madagascar lemur uses toxic millipedes for pest control. Bone up on makeup techniques with a flamingo and meet a honey badger that can pick locks.

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E4 - July-August - a Time of Migration
programme.desc: Witness some of the planet’s most dramatic natural shifts in July, from the Arctic ice sheets that come crashing down during the summer melt to the feeding frenzy when sockeye salmon reach the end of their journey in Alaska.

programme.title: E3 - Bahamas Hollywood Wrecks
programme.desc: The Bahamas is known as the “underwater movie capital of the world”. Hollywood has been coming here for decades, making epic movies and TV shows in its crystal clear waters, leaving behind a host of cinematic shipwrecks.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: E2 - Magicians of the Reef
programme.desc: Arabia’s coral reefs are home to some of nature’s most impressive illusionists. Creatures can pulsate with colour, transform in the blink of an eye, or perform riveting displays of showmanship. Because in these dangerous waters, disguise is crucial.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Coast
programme.desc: Go up against Australia’s wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals. Learn if these weapons, such as the kangaroo’s deadly boxing moves and the redback spider’s precision-engineered traps, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E4 - July-August - a Time of Migration
programme.desc: Witness some of the planet’s most dramatic natural shifts in July, from the Arctic ice sheets that come crashing down during the summer melt to the feeding frenzy when sockeye salmon reach the end of their journey in Alaska.

programme.title: E3 - Bahamas Hollywood Wrecks
programme.desc: The Bahamas is known as the “underwater movie capital of the world”. Hollywood has been coming here for decades, making epic movies and TV shows in its crystal clear waters, leaving behind a host of cinematic shipwrecks.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E1 - Collisions
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

programme.title: E3 - Choices
programme.desc: Learn how Ningaloo’s conservation miracle could inspire humans to pull the planet back from the brink of climatic destruction. Visit an abandoned whaling station and other ruins that show we have the tools, if only we can find the will to change.

programme.title: E1 - Snares Islands/ Tini Heke
programme.desc: Venture to the pristine wilderness of the Snares Islands, a remote animal sanctuary protected from the turbulent sea. Hop along with a colony of Snares crested penguins, soar with giant petrels and sooty shearwaters, and roar with giant sea lions.

programme.title: E2 - Otago Peninsula/ Muaupoko
programme.desc: Set sail for New Zealand’s Otago Peninsula, a breeding refuge for endangered seabirds and marine mammals. Watch as sea lions, albatrosses, red-billed gulls, white-fronted terns, and fairy prions find mates, then nurture the next generation.

programme.title: E3 - Bahamas Hollywood Wrecks
programme.desc: The Bahamas is known as the “underwater movie capital of the world”. Hollywood has been coming here for decades, making epic movies and TV shows in its crystal clear waters, leaving behind a host of cinematic shipwrecks.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: E2 - Magicians of the Reef
programme.desc: Arabia’s coral reefs are home to some of nature’s most impressive illusionists. Creatures can pulsate with colour, transform in the blink of an eye, or perform riveting displays of showmanship. Because in these dangerous waters, disguise is crucial.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E1 - Waterhole
programme.desc: Witness clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. See a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound, and a honey badger’s risky dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden

programme.title: E1 - A Penguin Proposal
programme.desc: Watch an Antarctic gentoo penguin pop the question with a rocky token of his devotion, then learn how a Madagascar lemur uses toxic millipedes for pest control. Bone up on makeup techniques with a flamingo and meet a honey badger that can pick locks.

programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: E2 - South East Tasmania
programme.desc: The team is in south-east Tasmania where Halina checks out the 3 Capes Walk, Craig visits a disused rail tunnel turned mushroom farm and Kristy meets a family creating locally made fashion from superfine merino wool.

programme.title: E7 - Powering The Future - A Catalyst Special - The Grid: Powering The Future
programme.desc: Dr. Niraj Lal meets the Australians leading the biggest change to the electricity grid in a century: the rise of renewable energy. Along the way he explores new technologies keeping the power on now and in the future.

programme.title: E43 - Lucy Durack
programme.desc: Leading lady Lucy Durack arrives with one of her favourite ingredients, bananas. She also has a big challenge for Alice, how can she get her kids to eat more vegetables??

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, a small entrepreneur and an endearing mother of three faces life's challenges with resilience and courage. Her constant pursuit of living a good life serves as an inspiration to many.

programme.desc: The untold early years of the Mahabharat's two iconic families - the five righteous Pandava brothers and the ambitious hundred Kaurava brothers growing up in the kingdom of ancient Hastinapur.

programme.title: E55 - Hui Gumm Yaadein
programme.desc: Dr. Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows

programme.desc: The lively and diverse residents of Gokuldham Housing Society live together as one big family. They navigate everyday challenges, celebrate festivals and find joy in each other's company.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery
programme.desc: In this program, children around the age of 4 can experience the pleasure of playing with friends, the wonder of life, the joy of doing thigs by themselves, and consideration for others, all while having fun through various discoveries.

programme.title: E52
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.
