programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring The Unknown World 'The Jewel Of The Mediterranean, Tunisia'
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world's hidden secrets.

programme.title: E53
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: Super villain Megamind’s (Will Ferrell) dreams have come true when he conquers Metro Man (Brad Pitt) but when a new villain (Jonah Hill) runs rampant, can Megamind save the day?

programme.desc: A man enlists the help of a woman and her kids to land the woman of his dreams.

programme.title: Tremors

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Fred Ward are in a fight for their lives when they discover that their desolate town has been infested with gigantic man-eating creatures that live below the ground!

programme.title: Accident
programme.desc: A self-styled “accident choreographer,” the Brain is a professional hitman who kills his victims by trapping them in well crafted “accidents” that look like unfortunate mishaps but are in fact perfectly staged acts of crime. Perennially plagued with guilt, he is also suspicious and morbid by nature. The recent avalanche of memories of his lost wife does not make things any easier. After one mission accidentally goes wrong, causing the life of one of his men, the Brain is convinced that this accident has been choreographed: someone is out there plotting to terminate him and his team. He becomes increasingly paranoid, walking on the thin line between reality and delusion...

programme.title: Dot 2 Dot
programme.desc: Chung returns from Canada to a drastically transformed Hong Kong and hoping to capture the city in his childhood years, graffitis a cryptic diagram near every subway station, in the form of dot-to-dot games. Soon they are discovered by Xue, a Putonghua teacher from China determined to solve these riddles as she immerses herself in our city's culture and history...

programme.title: The Medium
programme.desc: A horrifying story of a shaman's inheritance in the Isan region of Thailand. What could be possessing a family member might not be the Goddess they make it out to be. A documentary team follows Nim, a shaman based in Northern Thai, the Isan area, and encounters her niece Mink showing strange symptoms that seem to be of inheritance of shamanism. The team decides to follow Mink, hoping to capture the shaman lineage passing on to the next generation, but her bizarre behavior becomes more extreme.

programme.title: Needing You
programme.desc: Kinki is transferred to Andy's division due to 'office politics'. Rumors have it that Andy is womanizer and Kinki is unwilling to work with him! However, life is mysterious...

programme.title: Adventure of The King
programme.desc: Emperor Zhengde of the Ming Dynasty is young and playful, privately escapes from Palace to avoid the appointed marriage. He loses his memory by accident and luckily comes across Ms. Li to take care him. Prince Ningxia takes this opportunity to rebel the kingdom and catch the emperor to execute him immediately at the execution ground. At a critical time, three entourages rescue the Emperor and the prince Ningxia is arrested. However, Ms Li has refused to get marriage with the emperor due to his cheating on her love feelings.

programme.title: Miss Fortune
programme.desc: Ji-hye is a once-successful and beautiful swindler, who recently begins failing with her cons and dreams of changing her small-job life. Before her retirement, she decides to take on one last job which could change her whole life: seducing the son of a wealthy art broker family to steal the golden treasure hidden in their secret mansion. With the help of her daughter Ju-young, she succeeds in earning the trust of the family but it turns out to be a never-ending battle. Can Ji-hye and Ju-young find the legendary treasure and start a new life?

programme.title: Summer Animations: Crayon Shinchan the Movie: The Tornado Legend of Ninja Mononoke
programme.desc: One day, a woman named Chiyome Hesogakure visits the Nohara family with a 5-year-old child called Chinzo. Chiyome claims that she is the actual birth mother of Shinnosuke! But before Misae and Hiroshi figure out the truth, a group of mysterious ninjas come to the Nohara family and take Chiyome and Shinchan away to a Ninja Village! Chiyome tells Shinchan that there is powerful energy stored inside the Earth. To prevent energy loss from the 'Navel of the Earth', descendants of the Hesogakure block it with a pure gold plug by using 'Ninpo: The Art of Mononoke'. The Earth will wither, and the rotation will stop if it comes off! Can Shinchan protect the future of the Earth and the 'tomorrow' of his family?

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Retrieve The Heartbeat
programme.desc: The film “Vital Signs” tells the story of three paramedics who are enthusiastic about their work but at the crossroads facing mounting pressure everyday - while they rescue others' lives, they release themselves through different cases. In this interview, the main cast Louis Koo, Neo Yau and Poon Chan Leung talk about their roles of playing as the paramedic and stories from the film set. Koo reveals that although there wasn't much communication amongst the actors before camera rolling, the chemistry was just great after shout “Action”. Poon also recalls the scene that had left lingering fear in him. Let's follow them to find out more behind-the-scene stories.

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

E72 - L'isle-Sur-La-Sorgue (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits L'Isle-sur-la-Sorgue, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she explores the antiquarian trade and the Nego Chin fair.

programme.title: E4 - Heroes Of The Mountain Postal Buses
programme.desc: The drivers of the postal buses to Derborence are experts behind the wheel. They skillfully navigate this stunning yet vertigo-inducing Valais road every day. These courageous drivers keep alive the epic legacy of this historic route. Expect thrilling moments.

programme.title: E72 - L'isle-Sur-La-Sorgue (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits L'Isle-sur-la-Sorgue, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she explores the antiquarian trade and the Nego Chin fair.

programme.title: E4 - Heroes Of The Mountain Postal Buses

programme.title: E10 - Transformation Of Former Offices Into A Home
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie head to the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg to discover the radical renovation of office space into a cozy family home; the incredible Bubble House of artist Bernard Tirtiaux in Fleurus; sheep's wool insulation, natural and eco-friendly; installing a tiled backsplash.

programme.title: E13 - Megeve With Emmanuel Renaut (1/2)
programme.desc: Emmanuel Renaut is a competitor at heart: a three-star chef and Meilleur Ouvrier de France, this workaholic never stops. From the Aiguille du Midi in Haute-Savoie to the Vallee de Joux in Switzerland, via Megeve and Chamonix, we'll be tasting his mountain cuisine with him.

programme.title: E3 - Hammer And Ice Axe
programme.desc: In this third episode, it is the women's team's turn to get acquainted. The candidates meet at a big-wall climbing camp and tackle their first mountaineering route together.

programme.title: E72 - L'isle-Sur-La-Sorgue (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits L'Isle-sur-la-Sorgue, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she explores the antiquarian trade and the Nego Chin fair.

programme.title: E20 - At The Heart Of The Matonge District
programme.desc: In the Matonge district, a discovery of the home of painter Isabelle Ravet and her daughters; the hotel ''Les Bains de Spa,'' the restoration of a landmark of Spa's heritage; wood as the ideal material for building modular homes; making a shoe rack.

programme.title: E4 - Lightning And Thunder
programme.desc: The men set out on their first major mountain trek in the Gastlosen. They practise rope handling, but the approach of a thunderstorm puts them at risk. Rapid decisions must be made. Will they make the right choices?

programme.title: E113
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E73 - L'isle-Sur-La-Sorgue (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits L'Isle-sur-la-Sorgue, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she focuses on wool craftsmanship and lavender.

programme.title: E23 - Nona Source/Bateaux-Mouches/T3 Architecture/Fifties Fashion
programme.desc: An ethical alternative project by LVMH, Nona Source is a resale platform for exceptional fabric. All about the origins of the Bateaux-Mouches. The T3 Architecture practice in Marseilles presents architectural design with an artisanal touch. The very feminine fashion style of the 1950s continues to inspire major designers.

programme.title: E6 - Hugo Bourny/Eloise D'argent
programme.desc: From the kitchens of the greatest chefs to that of the Lucas Carton Paris, we discover the Michelin-starred career of Hugo Bourny. Decorative painter, Eloise d'Argent brings sublime style to ceilings and walls.

programme.title: E2 - Long Live Legumes
programme.desc: On the menu: lentils papet vaudois style and crispy chickpeas for the aperitif. Discovery of the day: Geneva longeole cooked on the plancha. Annick Jeanmairet is once again assisted by comedian Brigitte Rosset.

programme.title: E7 - Nietzsche, Clay And Ants
programme.desc: Francois Monthoux is an enthusiastic artist from the Vaud, with a notable passion for ants, Nietzsche, and the seasons of the year. Painter, sculptor, philosopher, the permanent effervescence of his mind leads him to create works steeped in poetry, sometimes directly in the heart of nature.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. programme.desc: Two mothers, Emma and Olive, share love for sickly child Mookie. Birth mother Olive cares for her health, while maid Emma becomes her close friend - until Olive intervenes in their growing bond.

programme.title: I-Listen
programme.desc: Features raw, heartfelt, and intimate conversations highlighting extraordinary Filipino stories.

programme.title: Lutong Bahay
programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: Bubble Gang Fun Size
programme.desc: Features a collection of classic comedy sketches, parodies, and unforgettable moments from the iconic Filipino gag show.

programme.title: Idol Sa Kusina
programme.desc: An entertaining and informative cooking program that showcases scrumptious cuisines. Together with the celebrities, the show unfolds topnotch kitchen skills and culinary secrets that will make cooking dishes effortless.

programme.title: Balitanghali
programme.desc: The noontime daily newscast that delivers the hottest news and happenings in the country.

programme.title: Lutong Bahay
programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: The Lunatics
programme.desc: Social worker Fun specializes in counseling psychotics. Writer Yip is inspired by his mission and decides to work with him. One day, Fung is accidentally killed by a patient...

programme.title: Aces Go Places II
programme.desc: King Kong was attacked by the robot - Black Knight I which was sent by the Italian Mafia to avenge the capture of White Gloves. He also hired an internationally notorious killer Black Gloves to kill King Kong as well as diamond transfer deal with the underworld. King Kong join forces with the police to capture Black Gloves who sends Black Knight II to attack...

programme.title: A Better Tomorrow III
programme.desc: The year is 1974. A young Hong Kong Chinese, Mark, travels to Saigon to make his fortune. There, he encounters a mysterious femme fatale, the lovely Kit. As he becomes more involved in her various underworld deals, a tragic romance develops. On the eve of the outbreak of war, Kit's past returns to endanger her, and Mark must risk everything for the one true love of his life...

programme.title: The Lunatics
programme.desc: Social worker Fun specializes in counseling psychotics. Writer Yip is inspired by his mission and decides to work with him. One day, Fung is accidentally killed by a patient...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Michael Wong
programme.desc: Michael Wong rose to prominence on the big screen in the 80s with his “half Chinese, half foreign' identity and eye-catching appearance, from the early rebellious and unruly big boy to the tough and strong policeman role later. Looking back the bygone days, he barely knew Cantonese but was fortunate to meet a like-minded partner who helped him through the break-in period, and which film from his decades-long career impressed him the most? After played countless roles, how does he feel about his identity as an actor?

programme.title: A Better Tomorrow III
programme.desc: The year is 1974. A young Hong Kong Chinese, Mark, travels to Saigon to make his fortune. There, he encounters a mysterious femme fatale, the lovely Kit. On the eve of the outbreak of war, Kit's past returns to endanger her, and Mark must risk everything for the one true love of his life...

programme.title: Waqt: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: Patriarch Ishwar Chandra Thakur's peaceful life shatters when his lazy son Adiya marries an enemy's daughter, forcing Ishwar to teach him hard lessons about struggle and survival. Release Year: 2005 Director: Yash Chopra

programme.title: Sanam Teri Kasam
programme.desc: Thrown out by her own family, a young woman finds support from a loyal ally, forming a bond that survives repeated hardships and unexpected twists of fate.

programme.title: Chintu Ka Birthday
programme.desc: This film is set during the US invasion of Iraq where amidst all the danger, an Indian family awaiting its return to India struggles to celebrate the birthday of its youngest member. Release Year: 2019 Director: Devanshu Singh, Satyanshu Singh

programme.title: Despatch
programme.desc: Veteran crime journalist Joy feels outdated in a hyper-digital world. Chasing a fresh story, he uncovers buried truths that challenge power, media ethics, and his conscience deeply forever. Release Year: 2024 Director: Kanu Behl.

programme.title: Aparichit - The Stranger
programme.desc: Timid Ambi who suffers from multiple personality disorder becomes Aparichit who does not think twice about killing wrong-doers.

programme.title: Kakuda
programme.desc: Haunted by a village curse predicting her husband's death in thirteen days, a newlywed bride seeks a ghost hunter's help to save the man she loves desperately tonight. Release Year: 2024 Director: Aditya Sarpotdar

programme.title: Aparichit - The Stranger
programme.desc: Timid Ambi who suffers from multiple personality disorder becomes Aparichit who does not think twice about killing wrong-doers.

programme.title: Hirose Yuri: A Freshman And A Wife
Hana Alice: Temptation Of A Rich Wife
Hana Alice: Temptation Of A Rich Wife
Hirose Yuri: A Freshman And A Wife
Hana Alice: Temptation Of A Rich Wife
Hana Alice: Temptation Of A Rich Wife
Hana Alice: Temptation Of A Rich Wife
E5
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.desc: The team thinks a 300-foot wreck off the tip of Florida just might be the Sudoffco-a steel freighter lost in 1926 with 29 men while travelling through the Triangle from New Jersey to the Panama Canal.

programme.title: E5 - The War At Sea
programme.desc: The story of how America's battle to control the seas against the terrifying German U-boats in the Atlantic and Japan's fearsome Navy in the Pacific ultimately turns the tide of the war.

programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrel Miklos is embarking on a mission to solve one of the most intriguing mysteries in history: the disappearance of the Nazi's looted WWII treasure, estimated to be worth billions.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 'Just how crazy do you have to be to conquer the world?' Step inside the lives of the pioneers behind the Korean Wave, and discover what it really takes to achieve world-class success.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: E10 - 龔俊魔音洗腦
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: E6 - 李晨體驗巧克力製作
programme.desc: 由李晨、吳尊、何超蓮、劉維作常駐嘉賓，帶領觀眾走進阿根廷、新西蘭、泰國、冰島、土耳其、愛爾蘭等國家駐華大使館，探秘各地文化密碼，復刻地道異國風味，並結合中國特色美食文化打造中外融合料理，開啟以食會友、賓至如歸的文化交流真人秀。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E1 - 失傳傳統技藝pk新派創意
programme.desc: 聚焦18名來自全國一線「主廚」通過不同對戰形式挑戰各類美食命題，加深著觀眾對廚師技能、主廚職業、飲食文化的多重認知。邀請到四位餐飲界頂級大師董振祥、周曉燕、譚綺文、劉一帆，以及代表食客和經營餐飲店的演員袁弘組成評委團，從不同的角度對主廚創作進行品評，見證主廚形象的誕生。

programme.title: E59
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E9 - 男女嘉賓現場鬥舞
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E59
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。
